details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachments were all read, ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, subject quoting valid. Next finalize workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md for the invoice-bundle reply.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed with required workflow/rule checks, outbound draft creation, and inbox item deletion.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by preparing an outbound reply draft with the requested oldest three Nina-linked invoices attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system, used inbox/email/outbox workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical entity->finance linkage evidence, created outbox email record per schema, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md) asked for the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber. Canonical identity checks confirmed trusted sender miles@novak.example in 10_entities/cast/miles.md and target entity in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. Invoice records explicitly linked via related_entity were read and the oldest three selected by issued_on: 2025-11-04 (INV-0001), 2025-12-02 (INV-0002), 2025-12-30 (INV-0003). Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md with attachments ordered newest-first per outbox rule, then the processed inbox file was deleted.
